{{Quote|Arrr, I'll make you suffer. And we so like suffering!|Big Jak Targrim|<ref name="RM" />}}
'''Big Jak Targrim''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] chief of the [[Riders of the Maelstrom]]. He was an extremely large [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] with four arms.

==Biography==
As of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Big Jak Targrim had become the powerful leader of the notorious [[Riders of the Maelstrom]]. While riding with his [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], Targrim led the group into many skirmishes to plunder [[Starship/Legends|ships]] passing through [[Maelstrom Nebula/Legends|the Maelstrom]]. Targrim underwent medical procedures to increase his ruthlessness; supplementing his own genetic code with [[DNA/Legends|DNA]] "acquired" from several [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]] to increase his fearsome demeanor.<ref name="RM" />

Targrim's leadership led to the complete domination of the Maelstrom until a rival pirate, [[Rodin Higron]], won the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Oasis (moon)|Oasis]] in a crooked [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game. The moon was located inside the Maelstrom, and Rodin Higron's pirates set up shop there. Furious with Higron's intrusion, Targrim devised a scheme to eliminate the rival gang. Targrim's pirates [[Attack on the Kuari Princess|hijacked]] the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] and [[Battle of Oasis|sent]] it on a collision course with Higron's base of operations. Unfortunately for the Riders, a team of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] agents boarded the ship and thwarted Targrim's plan.<ref name="RM" />
